certificate_holder_name: Southern Arizona Paving and Construction Co.
description_of_operations: Certificates of Insurance naming Southern Arizona Paving and Construction Co. as additional insured must be submitted prior to commencing work for job COT Rolling Hills - KENYON DRIVE BIKE HAWK, Contract 250001. General Liability must include Broad Form Property Damage, Contractual, On going and Completed Operations, ECU Coverage if applicable, and per Project Aggregate. All policies except Workers Compensation shall name Contractor as additional insured and be primary and non-contributory to the extent of Subcontractor's negligence. Policies shall also contain waivers of subrogation against the Contractor and Owner and shall not be cancelled without 30 days prior written notice.
